revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:県主神社]]
'''Agatanushi Jinja''' (県主神社 or 縣主神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} in Japan. * {{ill|Agatanushi Shrine (Minokamo)|ja|縣主神社 (美濃加茂市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi Shrine (Minokamo)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi Shrine (Minokamo)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Minokamo, Gifu|en|Minokamo, Gifu|qid=Q857305|lt=Minokamo, Gifu|1=Minokamo, Gifu}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Agatanushi Shrine (Ibara)|ja|縣主神社 (井原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi Shrine (Ibara)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi Shrine (Ibara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500733|1=Agatanushi Shrine (Ibara)}} - Located in {{ill|Ibara|en|Ibara|qid=Q863754|lt=Ibara, Okayama|1=Ibara}}, Okayama Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|県主神社|version=39192383|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:県主神社]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Agatanushi Shrine--><!--Agatanushi Shrine--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q11582625}} [[Category:Shinto shrines with the same name]]
